title: eleocharis japonica var. thermalis
intro: Eleocharis japonica var. thermalis, also known as Japanese Spike-Rush, is a type of wetland plant belonging to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Eleocharis japonica var. thermalis are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, relieve respiratory issues, and aid in digestion. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, although its use is largely limited to traditional medicine in specific regions.
